allow: Bash(ssh -o ConnectTimeout=10 goldmoodastro 'echo "still-alive"; ufw status verbose 2>&1 | head -20; echo "---"; which nginx mysql bun pm2 2>&1')
Bash(ssh goldmoodastro 'echo "→ nginx:";   systemctl is-active nginx; *)

Bash(timeout 25 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 -o BatchMode=yes goldmoodastro 'echo CONNECTED; cd /var/www/goldmoodastro && pwd && \(git rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree 2>/dev/null && git branch --show-current && git log --oneline -1 || echo "NOT_A_GIT_REPO"\); echo "--- pm2 ---"; pm2 ls 2>/dev/null | grep goldmood || pm2 ls')

Bash(timeout 30 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'pm2 ls | grep goldmoodastro-backend; echo "--- port ---"; ss -ltnp 2>/dev/null | grep :8094 | head -1; echo "--- git/build marker ---"; grep -c "swe.houses\\|house_pos\\|HOUSE_SYSTEM_CODE" /var/www/goldmoodastro/packages/shared-backend/modules/astrology/compute.ts')

Bash(timeout 30 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8094/api/birth-charts/preview -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"name\\":\\"pinar\\",\\"dob\\":\\"1985-06-12\\",\\"tob\\":\\"07:38:00\\",\\"tob_known\\":true,\\"pob_lat\\":40.98,\\"pob_lng\\":27.51,\\"pob_label\\":\\"Tekirdag\\"}"')
Bash(timeout 25 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'pm2 ls | grep goldmood | grep -oE "goldmoodastro-[a-z]+|online|errored"')
Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'curl -s --max-time 10 "http://127.0.0.1:8094/api/menu_items?location=footer&is_active=true&locale=tr" | head -c 600; echo')

Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'curl -s --max-time 10 "http://127.0.0.1:8094/api/menu_items?location=footer&is_active=true&locale=tr" | grep -oiE "\\"title\\":\\"[^\\"]*\(big|üçlü|uclu\)[^\\"]*\\",\\"url\\":\\"[^\\"]*\\"" | head')

Bash(timeout 120 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'cd /var/www/goldmoodastro/backend && bun run db:seed:nodrop 2>&1 | grep -iE "çalışıyor|Unknown column|ER_BAD|sqlMessage|error:|196_navigation" | tail -10')
Bash(timeout 25 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT id FROM menu_items ORDER BY id"')
Bash(awk '/INSERT INTO menu_items \\\(/{f=1} /INSERT INTO menu_items_i18n/{f=0} f && /^\\s*\\\(.mi-/{print}' backend/src/db/sql/196_navigation_seed.sql)

Bash(bun -e "const {DateTime}=require\('luxon'\); const d=DateTime.fromObject\({year:1979,month:6,day:8,hour:0,minute:30,second:0},{zone:'Europe/Istanbul'}\); console.log\('offset\(dk\):', d.offset, '| offset\(saat\):', d.offset/60, '| UTC:', d.toUTC\(\).toISO\(\)\)")

Bash(timeout 25 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8094/api/birth-charts/preview -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"name\\":\\"test1979\\",\\"dob\\":\\"1979-06-08\\",\\"tob\\":\\"00:30:00\\",\\"tob_known\\":true,\\"pob_lat\\":39.35,\\"pob_lng\\":33.72,\\"pob_label\\":\\"Kaman/Kirsehir\\"}"')
Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'grep -rniE "location.*admin|admin\\.goldmood|server_name" /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null | grep -iE "admin|server_name" | head')

Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT CHAR_LENGTH\(CAST\(value AS CHAR\)\), value FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\`=\\"theme_presets\\""')

Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT \\`key\\`, CHAR_LENGTH\(CAST\(value AS CHAR\)\) len, LEFT\(CAST\(value AS CHAR\),50\) FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\` IN \(\\"theme_presets\\",\\"active_theme_preset\\",\\"design_tokens\\"\)"')

Bash(timeout 40 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro < /var/www/goldmoodastro/backend/src/db/sql/013_theme_presets_seed.sql 2>&1 | tail -2; echo "--- restore sonrasi ---"; mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT \\`key\\`, CHAR_LENGTH\(CAST\(value AS CHAR\)\) len, LEFT\(CAST\(value AS CHAR\),40\) FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\` IN \(\\"theme_presets\\",\\"active_theme_preset\\"\)"; echo "--- tema sayisi ---"; mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT JSON_LENGTH\(value\) FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\`=\\"theme_presets\\""')

Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'grep -rln "Content-Security-Policy\\|connect-src\\|jsdelivr" /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/ 2>/dev/null | head; grep -roE "connect-src[^;\\"]*" /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/goldmoodastro.conf 2>/dev/null | head -1 | cut -c1-250')

Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT value FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\`=\\"design_tokens\\""')

Bash(timeout 20 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT \\`key\\`,LEFT\(CAST\(value AS CHAR\),60\) FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\` LIKE \\"cc_banner%\\" OR \\`key\\`=\\"ui_cookie\\" LIMIT 8"')

Bash(timeout 15 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'mysql --defaults-file=/root/.goldmoodastro-backup.cnf goldmoodastro -N -e "SELECT CAST\(value AS CHAR\) FROM site_settings WHERE \\`key\\`=\\"ui_cookie\\""')

Bash(timeout 15 ssh -o ConnectTimeout=12 goldmoodastro 'curl -s --max-time 8 "http://127.0.0.1:8094/api/site_settings?key=ui_cookie" | grep -oE "cc_banner_btn_accept[^,]*|cc_banner_title[^,]*" | head -2')
